creator: stephen@missouri.edu
text:
Some of the octave forge ports have been updated.

Fix: There is one new port (as a shar file) and lots of updates (a diff file).

If you would prefer I submit this as a bunch of PR's, please let me know.

# This is a shell archive.  Save it in a file, remove anything before
# this line, and then unpack it by entering "sh file".  Note, it may
# create directories; files and directories will be owned by you and
# have default permissions.
#
# This archive contains:
#
#	octave-forge-generate_html
#	octave-forge-generate_html/Makefile
#	octave-forge-generate_html/distinfo
#	octave-forge-generate_html/pkg-descr
#	octave-forge-generate_html/pkg-plist
#
echo c - octave-forge-generate_html
mkdir -p octave-forge-generate_html > /dev/null 2>&1
echo x - octave-forge-generate_html/Makefile
sed 's/^X//' >octave-forge-generate_html/Makefile << 'c89bbf6851aff1c0bbbb212f6a2a26cb'
X# New ports collection makefile for:	octave-forge-generate_html
X# Date created:		7 June 2009
X# Whom:			Stephen Montgomery-Smith <stephen@math.missouri.edu>
X#
X# $FreeBSD: ports/math/octave-forge-generate_html/Makefile,v 1.3 2009/04/05 20:50:40 dhn Exp $
X#
X
XPORTNAME=	octave-forge-generate_html
XPORTVERSION=	0.0.9
XCATEGORIES=     math
X
XMAINTAINER=	stephen@missouri.edu
XCOMMENT=        Octave-forge package ${OCTAVE_PKGNAME}
X
X.include <bsd.port.pre.mk>
X.include "${PORTSDIR}/Mk/bsd.octave.mk"
X.include <bsd.port.post.mk>
c89bbf6851aff1c0bbbb212f6a2a26cb
echo x - octave-forge-generate_html/distinfo
sed 's/^X//' >octave-forge-generate_html/distinfo << '5cc1e8cad261137ec599721a92024766'
XMD5 (octave-forge/generate_html-0.0.9.tar.gz) = 07c1ba7c42fa37ab243aa22ddd1fb5ac
XSHA256 (octave-forge/generate_html-0.0.9.tar.gz) = b03fdf380b04c805a306acfad36a0ef5ff58c9d5f92a48015be4e1d8d11d3bf6
XSIZE (octave-forge/generate_html-0.0.9.tar.gz) = 28129
5cc1e8cad261137ec599721a92024766
echo x - octave-forge-generate_html/pkg-descr
sed 's/^X//' >octave-forge-generate_html/pkg-descr << '7f8ff99e0423837768bed8d356a40dd3'
XThe octave-forge package is the result of The GNU Octave Repositry project,
Xwhich is intended to be a central location for custom scripts, functions and
Xextensions for GNU Octave. contains the source for all the functions plus
Xbuild and install scripts.
X
XThis is generate_html.
X
X  This package provides functions for generating HTML pages that contain
X  the help texts for a set of functions. The package is designed to be as
X  general as possible, but also contains convenience functions for
X  generating a set of pages for entire packages.
X
XWWW: http://octave.sourceforge.net/
7f8ff99e0423837768bed8d356a40dd3
echo x - octave-forge-generate_html/pkg-plist
sed 's/^X//' >octave-forge-generate_html/pkg-plist << '9c26f7dfb99d5f70831a5900294c1a2b'
X@comment This file intentionally left empty
9c26f7dfb99d5f70831a5900294c1a2b
exit
